8.reason: [This check is flawed: if the first number is -1, it will be skipped; also, after first iteration, ch1[i] may be 0 from initialization, causing early termination]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.06666666666666667 , reason:  [Loop condition i < j-1 may skip last term if j is small; also assumes ch1 and ch2 are properly packed, which they aren't due to earlier flaws]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.09090909090909091 , reason:  [Loop condition should likely be i < j, not j-1, because j operators correspond to j+1 numbers, but logic here is inconsistent]
